mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sql_task (task_id, prompt, form_code, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{prompt}, #{formCode}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sql_task SET status = #{status}, sql_result = #{sqlResult}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = datetime('now') WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sql_task WHERE create_time < datetime('now', '-' || #{days} || ' days')
